text: The atmosphere is somewhat futuristic yet sterile, illuminated by a cold blue glow. I feel a sense of curiosity as I pass through this glass-encased space, marked with signs of research and development. The vibrant wall inside, declaring 'R+D' and describing a space dedicated to innovation, draws me in. There is excitement at the possibility of human ingenuity, but also a kind of alienation—the environment is so controlled, almost clinical. I wonder how innovation feels when enclosed within walls so polished and contained.
